home.heroSubtitle: Search live seat availability, compare operators and fares, book securely, and receive an instant QR e-ticket for your journey across Sri Lanka.
home.searchEmpty: No routes seeded yet — add locations in Supabase to enable search.

home.operatorCtaTitle: Run a bus fleet? Fill more seats.
home.operatorCtaBody: List your buses on BusConnect and get a live manifest, dynamic pricing and revenue analytics - reach passengers across the country.

footer.brandBlurb: BusConnect is Sri Lanka's smartest online bus booking platform, making intercity travel simple with live seat availability, operator and fare comparisons, secure online booking, and instant QR e-tickets.
